title: デビュー戦の後に・進攻開始

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: At last, my debut is behind us.
choice_data_list: One small step, as they say.
One small step, as they say.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. As of today, we are true contenders in
the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The stage is set for us to take the Triple Crown.
Now, come—show me your strategic acumen.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Our path leads to the Classics, but they are still
some way off. What races should we attempt in
my junior year?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf aims to demonstrate her
superiority by deliberately taking the thorniest
road—the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Because of that, I don't want her to push herself
too hard while she's still in her junior year. The
Saudi Arabia Royal Cup seems like a safe choice.
choice_data_list: How about the Saudi Arabia R.C.?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Oh? How unexpected.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I thought you might opt for the Asahi Hai Futurity
Stakes, or perhaps the Hopeful Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Are they not where the best of the juniors are
crowned?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's right, but we're already setting our sights
high with the Classic Triple Crown. The last thing
we need is to make our agenda any harsher.
choice_data_list: We're not trying to be the best of the juniors.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hah... I see. I like the way you think.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Then the Saudi Arabia R.C. it shall be.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: With that decided, we should schedule our next—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Patter, patter, patter...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: There she is! Symboli Rudolf! Over here!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations on your debut! Do you have a
message for your fans?
choice_data_list: Sorry, we're a little busy right now...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I know it, we're being swarmed by
reporters. Rudolf needs to rest after her debut, so
I try to fend them off, but...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
No need to shield me, Trainer. Let me deal with
them.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Of course. As I said before the race, the eyes of
the world are on us. We mustn't waste that
opportunity.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I will be happy to take your questions. One at a
time, if you please.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
I'll start! So, now that you've made your racing
debut, what's next for Symboli Rudolf?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, I hope to claim the Classic Triple
Crown. To that end, I will continue to compete as
a junior...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It takes several hours for Symboli Rudolf to
answer all of the reporters' questions to her
satisfaction. By the time we get back to the
academy, it's already evening.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Well then, I suppose this is where we part ways.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Rest well, Trainer. You must be exhausted after
today.
choice_data_list: I'll walk you to the dorm, at least.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'm not going to the dorm. I thought I might
attend to some student council business before
turning in.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
At this hour. The press interviews concluded
earlier than I anticipated.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Which is to say, I fully expected to be accosted
by reporters after the race.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You may not have heard that they were coming,
but the members of the press do not always
observe proper protocol.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, many reporters would prefer to hear
off-the-cuff reactions rather than prepared
responses.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
They will naturally come during the moments after
a race, and all the more so when the interviewee
puts forward a spotless image.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like she was a lot more prepared than I
was. I shouldn't have let myself be caught
flat-footed like that.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You have nothing to apologize for.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
As the public face of the student body, I've had
more than my share of dealings with the media.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You too shall get used to them in time, like it or
not. After all, you are now the Emperor's gate
warden.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But we have strayed off topic. I have work to
attend to.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
To be clear, Trainer, I am not exerting myself
simply for the fun of it.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Now that I've made my debut, my schedule will be
packed with training and races.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But I have no intention of shirking my student
council duties.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: The Emperor must be the master of both the pen and the sword, or she is no Emperor at all.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
All of which will only be possible if I take care of
my health, of course. Rest assured, I will not
neglect that either.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Now, unless I am mistaken, this matter is settled.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I will see you tomorrow. Good night, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With that, she leaves, and I can't stop her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf is an incredible racer, perceptive
about the world around her, and attentive to her
own needs. Most of the time, she probably
doesn't need me at all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I want to do everything I can to make myself
useful on the few occasions when she does.
Anything to help her achieve her dream!
